affixs.detail: Party's Highlight damage is increased by 50%.
affixs.name: Special Effect

affixs.detail: Party's Bless damage is increased by 20%.
affixs.name: Special Effect

affixs.detail: Assassin allies' damage is increased by 20%.
affixs.name: Special Effect

affixs.detail: When allies deal damage with skills or Resonances, standard critical damage calculations are not carried out (regardless of whether or not a critical hit occurs), but deal increased final damage from skills and Resonances. This increase is equal to critical hit rate x (critical damage - 100%). (Max critical hit rate in this calculation is 100%).
affixs.name: Special Effect

affixs.detail: When the party activates a Technical, Attack is increased by 25% and critical damage by 25%.
affixs.name: Special Effect

affixs.detail: Foes inflicted with Burn take 20% increased damage.
affixs.name: Special Effect

affixs.detail: Sweeper allies' damage is increased by 20%.
affixs.name: Special Effect

affixs.detail: When allies deal damage with skills or Resonances, standard critical damage calculations are not carried out (regardless of whether or not a critical hit occurs), but deal increased final damage from skills and Resonances. This increase is equal to critical hit rate x (critical damage - 100%). (Max critical hit rate in this calculation is 100%).
affixs.name: Special Effect

mode.detail: Deal damage to make the boss Weakened and gain more points!
mode.name: Devourer of Dreams
